analysis.reasoning: Core message: An EU official is in Warsaw with Ylva Johansson to discuss the new EU Deal on Asylum and Migration, visit Frontex entering a "new era", and emphasize "Solidarity and Responsibility" as pillars of a Europe that protects. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story): Not explicitly about past achievements or overcoming historical obstacles; focuses on current policy, so not promoted. EU2 (EU is united): The emphasis on "Solidarity and Responsibility" across the EU and coordination with Poland, plus reference to a common EU deal, signals unity and ability to reach agreements; promoted. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens): Highlights practical EU policy (new asylum and migration deal), operational agency (Frontex) entering a new era, and protecting Europe—framing the EU as addressing citizens’ concerns and improving safety; promoted. EU4 (avant-garde actor): No claim of pioneering leadership beyond internal reforms; not clearly promoted. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): No explicit human rights/democracy framing; not promoted. EU6 (contributes to a better world): Focus is internal EU protection and management, not global contributions; not promoted. Conclusion: EU2 and EU3 apply.
